name: Drive Video Downloader
description: Download Google Drive viewer streams as audio, video, or a merged MP4.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; connect-src https://drive.google.com https://*.drive.google.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://*.googlevideo.com https://*.c.drive.google.com
